csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: Name attribute is used for object identification within FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_us: Name attribute is used for object identification within FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_gb: Name attribute is used for object identification within FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_fr: L'attribut Nom permet l'identification de l'objet dans FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_de: Das Namensattribut wird für die Objekt-ID in FlexPLM verwendet.
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_es: El atributo Nombre se emplea para identificar los objetos dentro de FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ja: 名前属性は FlexPLM 内でオブジェクトの識別に使用します
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_it: L'attributo Nome consente l'identificazione di oggetti in FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ko: Name attribute is used for object identification within FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ru: Name attribute is used for object identification within FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_zh_cn: 名称属性用于 FlexPLM 中的对象识别
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_zh_tw: Name attribute is used for object identification within FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_pt_br: Name attribute is used for object identification within FlexPLM

csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_fr: Groupe utilisé uniquement pour l'image de détail (image)

csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: This soft type enables administrators to manage where ThingWorx dashboards appear in the action menus of Object pages
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_us: This soft type enables administrators to manage where ThingWorx dashboards appear in the action menus of Object pages
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_gb: This soft type enables administrators to manage where ThingWorx dashboards appear in the action menus of Object pages
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_fr: Ce type paramétré permet aux administrateurs de gérer l'affichage des tableaux de bord ThingWorx dans les menus d'actions des pages d'objets.
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_de: Dieser Soft-Type ermöglicht es Administratoren festzulegen, wo ThingWorx Dashboards in den Aktionsmenüs von Objektseiten angezeigt werden.
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_es: Este tipo de software permite que los administradores controlen el lugar donde los paneles ThingWorx aparecen en los menús de acción de las páginas de objetos
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ja: このソフトタイプにより、管理者は、「オブジェクト」ページのアクションメニューで ThingWorx ダッシュボードを表示する場所を管理できるようになります。
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_it: Questo tipo soft consente agli amministratori di gestire il posizionamento dei cruscotti/dashboard ThingWorx nei menu delle azioni delle pagine degli oggetti
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ko: This soft type enables administrators to manage where ThingWorx dashboards appear in the action menus of Object pages
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ru: This soft type enables administrators to manage where ThingWorx dashboards appear in the action menus of Object pages
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_zh_cn: 管理员可以使用此可变类型来管理 ThingWorx 信息汇总在对象页面的操作菜单中出现的位置。
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_zh_tw: This soft type enables administrators to manage where ThingWorx dashboards appear in the action menus of Object pages
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_pt_br: This soft type enables administrators to manage where ThingWorx dashboards appear in the action menus of Object pages

csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ja: ダッシュボードアクセス

csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_fr: Inclure dans les rapports de saison
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ja: シーズンレポートに含める
